name: 分子间作用力
subject: chemistry
domain_name: Unit 3-4 分子间作用力与反应 IMF & Reactions
curriculum_points: Explain the relationship between the photoelectron spectrum of an atom or ion and: i. The ground-state electron configuration of the species. ii. The interactions between the electrons and the nucleus.

The energies of the electrons in a given shell can be measured experimentally with photoelectron spectroscopy (PES). The position of each peak in the PES spectrum is related to the energy required to remove an electron from the corresponding subshell, and the relative height of each peak is (ideally) proportional to the number of electrons in that subshell.
